overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a post-apocalyptic desert landscape at sunset. The character navigates rolling sand dunes and passes beneath ruined concrete structures while approaching a distant palm tree oasis.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert dunes with distant ruins

agents.ego_description: running across sand dunes toward the distant ruined skyline

entered.detail: cluster of tall derelict skyscraper spires silhouetted against the sun
rolling sand dunes forming the desert ground surface
hazy mountain silhouettes on the horizon
scattered bushes with orange and red foliage
rusted metal wreckage and debris scattered on the dunes

segments.scene_description: The character runs across open sand dunes toward a distant cluster of ruined skyscrapers silhouetted against the setting sun. The landscape features scattered orange vegetation and derelict metal wreckage, with mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert ruins approach with derelict structures

events.description: moving from open dunes into area with scattered concrete ruins

agents.ego_description: navigating through derelict structures while approaching the concrete overpass

entered.detail: large horizontal concrete bridge structure spanning the valley ahead
collapsed concrete building frames and broken walls

segments.scene_description: Moving through the ruins, the character navigates around derelict concrete structures and broken metal frameworks while approaching a massive concrete overpass. The ruined towers grow larger in the frame as the character closes the distance.

events.description: entering the shadowed area beneath the concrete bridge structure
moving from bright sunlight into the darker shadow under the bridge

agents.ego_description: running through the confined space beneath the concrete overpass

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible in the distance through the bridge opening

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadow of a large concrete bridge structure, passing underneath the weathered overpass. Lighting shifts to a darker, sheltered tone as the character moves through the confined space, with palm trees visible in the bright distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert oasis with palm tree valley

events.description: exiting the bridge shadow into the open palm tree oasis
emerging back into direct golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: running through the palm tree oasis toward the distant valley

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the bridge, the scene opens into a desert oasis filled with tall palm trees. The character continues running through the sandy valley as the sun illuminates the palm fronds and distant mountains, with the concrete structure now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an open desert that gradually closes in around the character as they enter a cluster of urban ruins. It begins with the character running across rolling sand dunes dotted with orange vegetation and metal wreckage, heading toward distant skyscrapers silhouetted against a setting sun. As the character advances, the wide horizon of mountains recedes and the ruined towers grow larger in the frame, dominating the skyline. The scene then shifts from the open wilderness into a dense corridor of derelict concrete structures and broken metal frameworks before finally approaching a massive concrete overpass.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of a ruined overpass into the radiant light of a desert oasis. It begins as the character enters the dark, sheltered space beneath a weathered concrete bridge, where the lighting dims and the surroundings feel confined. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up and the lighting shifts abruptly from shadow to bright sunlight upon emerging from the structure. The camera then expands across a sandy valley filled with tall palm trees and distant mountains, leaving the concrete ruins behind in favor of the illuminated landscape.
